Headline: #20 Madison Temporary Reroute at Madison/Albany
ShortDescription: 20 Madison buses are temporarily rerouted via Madison, Kedzie, Jackson, Sacramento and Madison: due to, police activity near Madison/Albany.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#20 Madison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Madison, Kedzie, Jackson, Sacramento, Madison and over regular route: due to, police activity near Madison/Albany.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Trains bypassing Grand Station
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are running, and are still not stopping at Grand due to a police investigation.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are running, and are still not stopping at Grand due to a police investigation.

Also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include: #65 Grand buses. 

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
